steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which sentence best emphasizes the location of the figure in New Day Coming. The relevant note states: "New Day Coming (48 x 120 in) depicts a woman in a white dress floating on the left side of the canvas." We need the choice that foregrounds that left-side placement.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — While the number of figures may differ, constant among Rawles's hyperrealistic works is the tranquil mood that the paintings evoke.: Focuses on mood (tranquil), not on where the figure is located. ✗
  • Choice B — In Rawles's painting *New Day Coming*, a woman is depicted on the left side of the canvas.: Directly states the figure’s location as "the left side of the canvas," which is exactly what the question asks us to emphasize. ✓
  • Choice C — Rawles captures the water in paintings such as *Yesterday Called and Said We Were Together* and *New Day Coming* in vivid hues of mint blue and navy.: Focuses on the color of the water, not the location of the figure. ✗
  • Choice D — At 48 by 120 inches, Rawles's *New Day Coming* is even larger than the sizable 48-by-60-inch painting *Yesterday Called and Said We Were Together*.: Focuses on the size of the painting, not on where the figure appears within it. ✗
B is correct.
